title: Will the **high temp in NYC** be 45-46° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Central Park, New York for March 19, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is between 45-46°, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the **high temp in NYC** be <43° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Central Park, New York for March 19, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is less than 43°, then the market resolves to Yes.
